messages.message:
Hey there! 👋

I'm Dreamwed Assistant, your guide to capturing those unforgettable moments! ✨

Congratulations on your upcoming event! So excited you reached out to us. 💛

Could you please tell me a bit about your wedding or event? Like the date and the venue/place? 😊

Hey again! 😊

Just checking in to see if you received my last message.

I'd love to know your wedding date and venue so I can help you better. What are your plans? 📅📍

Got it! 😊

To help me recommend the perfect package for you, could you please share your wedding date and venue? This helps me check our availability and tailor our options for you. 📅📍
[REMINDER] Hi! 😊 Just checking in — did you get a chance to discuss with family about your wedding photography? We're here if you have any questions! 💛

[REMINDER] Good day! 🌟 We still have your enquiry with us. Your wedding day deserves the best memories — that's exactly what we create at Dreamwed Stories 💛

Shall we take the next step?

[REMINDER] Hi! 🔔 Just a gentle reminder — *your date may still be open* but we're getting more enquiries for that period!

We'd love to block it for you before it fills up 🙏 Just say the word!
